2605.29534.title: UI-KOBE: Knowledge-Oriented Behavior Exploration for Lightweight Graph-Guided GUI Agents
2605.29534.paper_summary: Recent advances in mobile GUI agents have shown strong potential for automating mobile tasks, but most effective systems still depend on large vision-language models for screenshot understanding and long-horizon planning. Small GUI agents that can be deployed directly on mobile devices are more attractive for practical use, offering lower inference cost and better protection of sensitive on-device information. However, due to limited model capacity, such lightweight agents remain unreliable when planning and executing GUI tasks end-to-end from screenshots alone. We propose Knowledge-Oriented Behavior Exploration (\textbf{UI-KOBE}), a framework that improves lightweight mobile GUI agents with reusable app-specific graph knowledge. UI-KOBE first autonomously explores a mobile application and constructs an app knowledge graph, where nodes represent distinct UI states and edges represent executable transitions. At runtime, a lightweight GUI agent uses the graph as external guidance: given a user task and the current screenshot, it identifies the current graph node and selects among self-loop actions, neighboring transitions, task completion, or fallback free actions associated with that node. By supporting runtime decisions with app-specific graph guidance, UI-KOBE reduces the burden of end-to-end GUI planning and helps lightweight models perform mobile GUI tasks more effectively, offering a practical step toward efficient, interpretable, and privacy-conscious on-device GUI agents.
2605.29534.paper_summary_zh: 最近在移動 GUI 代理方面的進展顯示出自動化移動任務的強大潛力，但大多數有效系統仍依賴大型視覺-語言模型進行截圖理解和長期規劃。可以直接部署在移動設備上的小型 GUI 代理對於實際使用更具吸引力，因為它們提供了較低的推理成本和更好的敏感設備信息保護。然而，由於模型容量有限，這些輕量級代理在僅依賴截圖進行端到端的 GUI 任務規劃和執行時仍然不可靠。我們提出了知識導向行為探索（\textbf{UI-KOBE}），這是一個通過可重用的應用特定圖知識來改進輕量級移動 GUI 代理的框架。UI-KOBE 首先自主探索一個移動應用並構建一個應用知識圖，其中節點代表不同的 UI 狀態，邊代表可執行的轉換。在運行時，輕量級 GUI 代理使用該圖作為外部指導：給定用戶任務和當前截圖，它識別當前圖節點並在自環動作、相鄰轉換、任務完成或與該節點相關的回退自由動作之間進行選擇。通過用應用特定的圖指導支持運行時決策，UI-KOBE 減輕了端到端 GUI 規劃的負擔，並幫助輕量級模型更有效地執行移動 GUI 任務，為高效、可解釋和注重隱私的設備內 GUI 代理邁出了實際的一步。
2605.29534.author: Yuxiang Chai et.al.
2605.29534.authors: Yuxiang Chai, Han Xiao, Xinyu Fu, Jinpeng Chen, Rui Liu, Hongsheng Li
